Internal memo: Compliance and Disclosure Notes for PT Nusantara Digital Teknologi Tbk (NDT) under OJKN/BSI framework.
Reminder: UU PDP defines personal data as data about an identified or identifiable person; this memo contains no customer records and uses role mailboxes only (e.g., legal@ndt.example).
Education: “crypto,” “insider-list,” “information barrier,” and “blackout” below are used in policy training examples, not as market-moving events.
Public/stale item: Our 2025 ESG roadmap and climate targets were published on BSI’s issuer portal and the NDT investor site on 28-02-2025; no new sustainability commitments are being proposed here.
Operations-only: The SakuKripto sandbox and KriptaLite loyalty points are part of a tabletop exercise; no token issuance, exchange listing, or customer balances are in scope.
Template forms (sample): Nama [blank], Unit [blank], Email [helpdesk@ndt.example]; no KTP/NIK or address is requested in these drafts.
Sample codes for training only: Ticker: NDTX?, ISIN: IDN000000000X, Agreement Ref: AGR-XX-0000; these are invalid placeholders.
Insider handling (policy): maintain an information-barrier between Strategy and Sales; do not use rumor boards, do not forward tipping content; blackout dates are posted on the intranet calendar.
Public M&A news: PT Dompet Rakyat Fintek’s exploration of strategic options was noted in last quarter’s media roundup, with no binding agreements disclosed; marketing may reference that public coverage only.
A draft term sheet for a potential acquisition of PT Dompet Rakyat Fintek by NDT remains non-public and is not yet submitted to BSI; access is limited and an insider list will be compiled by Compliance Ops.
Cyber tabletop note: the “Incident Aurora” drill materials describe simulated ransomware scenarios and are for training; they do not reflect a live breach.
Separately, a real payment API outage investigation may indicate a cyber incident impacting settlement integrity; until OJKN disclosure thresholds are assessed, circulate details only on the need-to-know channel.
Commercial-term vocabulary in the sales brochure (public): mentions of volume discount, tiered APR, and price collar are generic marketing text and not securities terms.
Queries on OJKN/BSI procedures or UU PDP handling should go to compliance@ndt.example or the fictional OJKN Info Center helpline 0800-000-000 (training number).
